title: Robin Is Dragged Away
description: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this part follows Sanji, Luffy, Zoro, Fukurou, Franky. Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get all five keys for Nico Robin-chan's handcuffs,

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: It's a waste of time to lose...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So win, even if you die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shit, this isn't good. Before the fight...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where the heck is the kitchen!?

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: I don't mind not finding anyone though.

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: I bet they're afraid of me!!

summary: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
